◎简　　介  

　　In 1954 Vietnam, at the time of Diên Biên Phu, a French unit on patrol under the command of an inexperienced lieutenant is gradually depleted by Vietminh until only an ex-Wehrmacht Alsatian adjutant remains. He is to die, a title informs us, in Algeria in 1960.Semi-documentary in style, this is an effectively low-key appraisal of the difficult choices with which war confronts ...
